headline: PTC's Codebeamer Powers Mazda's Software-Defined Vehicle Development
summary: PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced that Mazda Motor Corporation, a leading global automaker, has selected the PTC Codebeamer® Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) solution to support its software-defined vehicle development (SDV). Mazda will use Codebeamer to standardize requirements, testing, and validation, enabling end-to-end traceability and faster product development while meeting automotive standards.
